items.title: Cisco and OpenAI redefine enterprise engineering with Codex
items.lead_paragraph: Cisco and OpenAI are redefining enterprise engineering with Codex, helping Cisco scale AI-native development, accelerate AI Defense work, and automate defect remediation.

items.title: Building self-improving tax agents with Codex
items.lead_paragraph: See how OpenAI, Thrive, and Crete built a self-improving tax agent with Codex, automating filings, improving accuracy, and accelerating workflows.

items.title: Warp’s big bet on building open source with GPT-5.5
items.lead_paragraph: Warp uses GPT-5.5 and OpenAI models to coordinate coding agents across local, cloud, and open-source development workflows.

items.title: Election information and safeguards in 2026
items.lead_paragraph: Ahead of global elections, we’re helping people access information, supporting cyber defenders, and increasing AI transparency

items.title: OpenAI, Grupo Folha and Grupo UOL announce strategic content partnership
items.lead_paragraph: OpenAI partners with Grupo Folha and Grupo UOL to bring trusted Brazilian journalism to ChatGPT, expanding access to news with attribution and transparency.

items.title: OpenAI named a Leader in enterprise coding agents by Gartner
items.lead_paragraph: OpenAI is named a leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Enterprise AI Coding Agents, with Codex recognized for innovation and enterprise-scale deployment.

items.title: How Virgin Atlantic ships faster with Codex
items.lead_paragraph: How Virgin Atlantic used Codex to ship its revamped mobile app on a fixed holiday travel deadline, reaching near-total unit test coverage and zero P1 defects.

items.title: AdventHealth advances whole-person care with OpenAI
items.lead_paragraph: AdventHealth is using ChatGPT for Healthcare to streamline workflows, reduce administrative burden, and return more time to patient care.
